# Quick Move & Packing Service

Family-owned full-service moving company based in Harrison, NY. Serving Westchester County, New York City, and Fairfield County, CT for over 30 years. Licensed (NY #38255), insured, and operated by the Rocco family.

## What we do

- Local moving across Westchester County and the tri-state area
- Long distance moves from Westchester to the surrounding region
- Commercial and office relocations (weekend/overnight scheduling available)
- Professional packing — full home or partial
- Labor-only moving (loading, unloading, rearranging — no truck required)
- Storage move-ins, move-outs, and transfers
- Last-minute and short-notice moves
- Junk removal and whole-home clean-outs

## Key facts

- Founded: 1996
- Address: 240 Halstead Avenue, Harrison, NY 10528
- Phone: (914) 732-3733
- Email: steven@myquickmove.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Ratings: 4.9 stars on Google (88 reviews), 4.8 on Angi (198 reviews)

## Service areas

Primary: White Plains NY, Mamaroneck NY, Rye NY, Larchmont NY, Harrison NY
Extended: All of Westchester County, NYC (all five boroughs), Fairfield County CT
